tasks.subject: Task 1: Extract buildEventRec helper
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Pull the actionResult → eventRec translation into a standalone helper so the queue worker can reuse it.

**Files:**
- Modify: `tools/miniscram-gui/main.go`
- Modify: `tools/miniscram-gui/result_handler_test.go`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `buildEventRec(mdl, action, input, output, res)` exists and is unit-tested.
- [ ] `handleActionResult` delegates row-building to it.
- [ ] Existing 6 tests in `result_handler_test.go` pass unchanged.

**Verify:** `cd tools/miniscram-gui && go test -run 'TestHandleActionResult|TestBuildEventRec' ./...` → 7 pass

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tools/miniscram-gui/main.go", "tools/miniscram-gui/result_handler_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "cd tools/miniscram-gui && go test -run 'TestHandleActionResult|TestBuildEventRec' ./...", "acceptanceCriteria": ["buildEventRec exists and is unit-tested", "handleActionResult delegates to it", "existing tests pass unchanged"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: queueModel data layer (types, classify, walk, addPaths)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Pure data layer — no UI, no goroutines yet. Adds `queue *queueModel` field to `model`.

**Files:**
- Create: `tools/miniscram-gui/queue.go`
- Create: `tools/miniscram-gui/queue_test.go`
- Modify: `tools/miniscram-gui/main.go` (add queue field, init in main())

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `queueModel`, `queueItem`, `queueState` defined per spec
- [ ] `classify`, `walkForCues`, `addPaths` implemented
- [ ] `addPaths` dedups via `filepath.Abs+Clean`
- [ ] `model.queue` field added and initialised
- [ ] Worker kick is TODO'd (Task 8 uncomments)

**Verify:** `cd tools/miniscram-gui && go test -run 'TestClassify|TestWalkForCues|TestAddPaths' ./...` → 5 pass

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tools/miniscram-gui/queue.go", "tools/miniscram-gui/queue_test.go", "tools/miniscram-gui/main.go"], "verifyCommand": "cd tools/miniscram-gui && go test ./...", "acceptanceCriteria": ["queueModel/queueItem/queueState per spec", "classify/walkForCues/addPaths implemented", "dedup works", "model.queue field added and initialised"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: --progress=json plumbing (prettyProgressLine, packPhases)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add NDJSON parser, packPhases lookup, prettify the running-strip line, and pass --progress=json from existing single-file callers.

**Files:**
- Modify: `tools/miniscram-gui/queue.go`
- Modify: `tools/miniscram-gui/queue_test.go`
- Modify: `tools/miniscram-gui/widgets.go`
- Modify: `tools/miniscram-gui/main.go`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `prettyProgressLine` returns friendly output for NDJSON, falls through for plain text
- [ ] `lookupFraction` does prefix-match against `packPhases`
- [ ] All single-file Pack/Verify/Unpack callers pass `--progress=json`
- [ ] Strip widget calls `prettyProgressLine` on `state.LastLine`

**Verify:** `cd tools/miniscram-gui && go test -run 'TestPrettyProgressLine|TestLookupFraction' ./... && go build ./...`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tools/miniscram-gui/queue.go", "tools/miniscram-gui/queue_test.go", "tools/miniscram-gui/widgets.go", "tools/miniscram-gui/main.go"], "verifyCommand": "cd tools/miniscram-gui && go test ./... && go build ./...", "acceptanceCriteria": ["prettyProgressLine works", "lookupFraction prefix-matches", "all single-file callers pass --progress=json", "strip uses prettyProgressLine"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Queue worker (drain) with done-channel ownership
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Worker goroutine that processes ready items sequentially via the existing actionRunner.

**Files:**
- Modify: `tools/miniscram-gui/queue.go`
- Modify: `tools/miniscram-gui/runner_test.go` (add NDJSON fake modes)
- Modify: `tools/miniscram-gui/queue_test.go`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Worker drains qReady items via runner.Start("pack", ..., --progress=json)
- [ ] State transitions: qReady → qRunning → qDone/qFailed/qCancelled
- [ ] Toast NOT set by worker (suppression)
- [ ] On stop: in-flight cancelled, remaining qReady → qCancelled, only one event row
- [ ] On cancel-current: worker advances to next ready

**Verify:** `cd tools/miniscram-gui && go test -run 'TestDrain|TestStopQueue|TestCancelCurrent' ./...` → 3 pass

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tools/miniscram-gui/queue.go", "tools/miniscram-gui/queue_test.go", "tools/miniscram-gui/runner_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "cd tools/miniscram-gui && go test ./...", "acceptanceCriteria": ["drain processes qReady sequentially", "state transitions correct", "toast suppression", "stop drains remaining to cancelled", "cancel-current advances"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: TestPackPhasesCoverage (live miniscram check)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Lock packPhases against silent label drift in pack.go.

**Files:**
- Modify: `tools/miniscram-gui/queue_test.go`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Test runs real `miniscram pack --progress=json` against a fixture
- [ ] Asserts every step.Label matches a packPhases prefix
- [ ] Skips cleanly if no `miniscram` on PATH or no fixture

**Verify:** `cd tools/miniscram-gui && go test -run TestPackPhasesCoverage ./... -v` → PASS or SKIP

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tools/miniscram-gui/queue_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "cd tools/miniscram-gui && go test -run TestPackPhasesCoverage ./... -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["runs real miniscram pack", "asserts label coverage", "skips cleanly when no fixture"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Native pickers (pickFiles, pickDir)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add multi-select and directory pickers for Linux/macOS/Windows.

**Files:**
- Modify: `tools/miniscram-gui/main.go`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `pickFiles()` returns []string from native multi-select dialog
- [ ] `pickDir()` returns one absolute path or empty
- [ ] Build clean on Linux

**Verify:** `cd tools/miniscram-gui && go build ./...` → clean

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tools/miniscram-gui/main.go"], "verifyCommand": "cd tools/miniscram-gui && go build ./...", "acceptanceCriteria": ["pickFiles multi-select", "pickDir directory", "clean Linux build"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Queue panel + row widgets
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Render the queue panel (header, buttons, items, stop) and rows with state-driven visuals including the green progress fill.

**Files:**
- Create: `tools/miniscram-gui/queue_widget.go`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `queuePanel` callable from loop()
- [ ] Empty state shows drop-target hint
- [ ] All 6 queueState values render distinctly
- [ ] Green fill = panel_w × it.Fraction
- [ ] Per-row click + action (×/⏹) buttons keyed by ID
- [ ] Stop button only shows while workerRunning

**Verify:** `cd tools/miniscram-gui && go build ./...` → clean

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tools/miniscram-gui/queue_widget.go"], "verifyCommand": "cd tools/miniscram-gui && go build ./...", "acceptanceCriteria": ["queuePanel callable", "empty state", "6 row visuals", "progress fill", "row buttons keyed by ID", "stop button conditional"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: main.go integration (Hflex, auto-follow, button wiring)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Wire the queue into loop() — Hflex layout, auto-follow rule, button-disable, stop/cancel handlers, addPaths kick in queue.go.

**Files:**
- Modify: `tools/miniscram-gui/main.go`
- Modify: `tools/miniscram-gui/queue.go` (uncomment worker kick)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Body is Hflex: queue panel | divider | inspect-or-stats list
- [ ] Single-file buttons disable while q.workerRunning
- [ ] FrameEvent drain skips runner.done while workerRunning
- [ ] Add files / Add dir buttons spawn pickers in goroutines
- [ ] Row click triggers auto-follow per spec rule
- [ ] ×/⏹ buttons remove pending / cancel current
- [ ] Stop queue button sets stopped=true + cancels
- [ ] DestroyEvent sets stopped=true before grace

**Verify:** `cd tools/miniscram-gui && go vet ./... && go test ./... && go build ./...`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tools/miniscram-gui/main.go", "tools/miniscram-gui/queue.go"], "verifyCommand": "cd tools/miniscram-gui && go vet ./... && go test ./... && go build ./...", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Hflex body", "single-file buttons disabled while queue runs", "FrameEvent drain skip", "add buttons wired", "auto-follow rule", "row buttons wired", "stop queue", "DestroyEvent"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: Drag-and-drop wiring (text/uri-list)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Accept dropped files and dirs via Gio's transfer.TargetFilter.

**Files:**
- Modify: `tools/miniscram-gui/main.go`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Window registers `text/uri-list` target
- [ ] DataEvent body parsed line-by-line as file:// URIs
- [ ] Paths fed to q.addPaths
- [ ] Linux build clean

**Verify:** `cd tools/miniscram-gui && go build ./...` → clean. Manual smoke (Linux): drop a dir, observe queue populate.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tools/miniscram-gui/main.go"], "verifyCommand": "cd tools/miniscram-gui && go build ./...", "acceptanceCriteria": ["text/uri-list target registered", "DataEvent parsed", "paths feed addPaths", "clean build"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 10: Smoke verification + screenshot refresh
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Walk the spec's manual smoke checklist on a real fixture; update screenshots if needed.

**Files:**
- Possibly: `tools/miniscram-gui/screenshots/`
- Possibly: `tools/miniscram-gui/README.md`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Drop directory → queue populates and runs
- [ ] Click done row → loads in inspect
- [ ] Click row mid-run → auto-follow toggles correctly
- [ ] Stop queue mid-pack → no orphans, all remaining cancelled
- [ ] Add files / Add dir buttons feed queue
- [ ] Drop .miniscram → loads inspect, autoFollow disengages
- [ ] No orphan miniscram processes after stop

**Verify:** Walk each bullet manually; record any deviations.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tools/miniscram-gui/"], "verifyCommand": "manual smoke", "acceptanceCriteria": ["directory drop", "row interaction", "stop queue clean", "native pickers", "miniscram drop", "no orphans"]}
```
